name: Basel Compliance Screening with Payment Hub
description: Basel Compliance Screening with Payment Hub books trades and settles customer profiles; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via CRM to lower chargebacks.

steps.name: Transfer Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize statements from Core Banking; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Propose
steps.description: Execute propose phase for the Iterative-Improve pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Improve
steps.description: Execute improve phase for the Iterative-Improve pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Portfolio Check
steps.description: Portfolio Check across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Limit Control
steps.description: Limit Control across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Settlement
steps.description: Settlement across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Reconciliation Summary
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to SWIFT Gateway; return response JSON for the client.
